statConfig.statIncreaseHint: Stat increases are gained at levels 4, 5, 8, 9, 12, 13, 16, 17, and 20
statConfig.baseScoresWarning: Your base scores do not match any of the standard Nimble stat arrays.
statConfig.bonusesSubtitle: Modifiers from feats, items, and other sources
statConfig.noBonuses: No bonuses from feats or items
statConfig.statIncreasesSubtitle: Improvements gained at certain class levels
statConfig.primaryTooltip: +1 to one of your Key Stats
statConfig.secondaryTooltip: +1 to one of your Secondary Stats

chat.noHealingRecord: No healing record found to undo

startingEquipment.hint: Heroes start with the equipment listed for their class and background OR 50 gp to buy their starting equipment.
startingEquipment.goldDescription: Receive 50 gp to purchase your own equipment

characterCreation.incompleteStepsWarning: Some character creation steps have not been completed.
characterCreation.incompleteCharacterMessage: This character isn’t finished. Create anyway?

ancestryOptions.sizeCategoryHint: Choose your character's size category from those available to your ancestry.
ancestryOptions.enhancedSaveHint: Choose a neutral save to enhance with advantage.

backgroundOptionsSelection.hint: Your background lets you choose which ancestry raised you. This grants you their native language.

bonusLanguageSelection.hint: All heroes speak Common by default, and some backgrounds will grant another language. Additionally, each point of INT grants an additional language known.

saveConfig.abilityModifierSubtitle: Base modifier from linked ability score
saveConfig.ancestryTraitsSubtitle: Features that enhance a save of your choice

armorEffects.medium: Monsters with Medium Armor ignore all damage modifiers from stats and other effects, taking damage from the sum of the dice only.
armorEffects.heavy: Monsters with Heavy Armor ignore damage modifiers and take half the sum of the dice (rounding up).

conditionDescriptions.blinded: Can't see. Attacks against you have advantage, and your attacks have disadvantage.
conditionDescriptions.charged: Whenever you take lightning damage you are Charged for 1 minute.
conditionDescriptions.charmed: Sees the charmer as an ally. Charmer has advantage on social interactions with you.
conditionDescriptions.concentration: Can only Concentrate on 1 thing at a time. DC 10 STR save when crit or lose concentration.
conditionDescriptions.dazed:
Heroes: lose 1 action.

Monsters: can perform one less action on their next turn.
conditionDescriptions.dead: You die when you have taken 6 Wounds (unless you have an ability that changes this number). There are ways to revive a hero who has died, but they are rare and often come at a very steep cost.
conditionDescriptions.despair: Disadvantage on the next attack you make in this encounter.
conditionDescriptions.distracted: A target is distracted if it is adjacent to or Taunted by an ally, or if it cannot see you.
conditionDescriptions.dying: At 0HP. Taking damage while dying causes 2 Wounds, a crit causes 3 instead.
conditionDescriptions.frightened: Disadvantage on rolls when source of fear is nearby; speed halved when moving closer to it.
conditionDescriptions.grappled: Cannot move. Attacks against you have advantage.
conditionDescriptions.hampered: Any creature with their actions or movement reduce (e.g. Dazed, Grappled, Prone, Difficult Terrain).
conditionDescriptions.incapacitated: Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.invisible: Cannot be seen. Your attacks have advantage, and attacks against you have disadvantage.
conditionDescriptions.lastStand: At or below the Last Stand threshold. Triggers Last Stand abilities.
conditionDescriptions.paralyzed: Incapacitated. Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.petrified: Incapacitated. You have all the benefits and drawbacks of being a rock! Immune to most damage except from large explosions, picks, or similar tools.
conditionDescriptions.prone: Movement costs twice as much, and disadvantage on attacks. Melee attacks against you have advantage; Ranged have disadvantage. Spend 3 spaces of your Speed to stand up.
conditionDescriptions.restrained: Cannot move. Attacks against you have advantage.
conditionDescriptions.riding: You move with the creature you are riding. Any attacks that miss you, strike them.
conditionDescriptions.silenced: Cannot cast spells or use other abilities that require speaking (e.g. Commander's Orders).
conditionDescriptions.smoldering: Some fire spells can inflict the Smoldering condition and gain additional destructive effects against Smoldering enemies.
conditionDescriptions.stunned: Incapacitated. Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.taunted: Disadvantage on attacks except against the most recent taunter.
conditionDescriptions.unconscious: Incapacitated. Can't do anything. Attacks against you have advantage, and melee attacks that hit, crit.
conditionDescriptions.wounded: Has any Wounds (typically 6 Wounds and a hero is dead).

languageHints.draconic: Typically spoken by Dragons, Dragonkin, and Kobolds.
languageHints.dwarvish: Typically spoken by Dwarves, Gnomes, and Giants.
languageHints.elvish: Typically spoken by Elves, Fey, and Sylvan.
languageHints.goblin: Typically spoken by Goblins and Orcs.
languageHints.primordial: Spoken by Elementals and Ancient Beings.

hints.skillPointAssignment: You may assign a single skill point to a skill of your choice. In addition, you may transfer one of your assigned skill points to another skill of your choice.
hints.characterCreationSkillPointAssignment: You can now assign 4 skills points to increase the modifiers for your skills.
hints.statAssignment: Below you will find the stat bonuses granted by your selected array. Drag and drop each of these values onto one of the attribute boxes below to assign your stats.
hints.hideRollsFromPlayersByDefaultHint: When enabled, skill check and weapon roll dialogs will default to hiding the roll from other players.

statIncrease.capstoneDescription: Select any 2 stats to increase by +1

levelUpDialog.skillPointsOverMax: One or more skills would exceed the 12 point cap. Please reallocate skill points before submitting.
levelUpDialog.skillPointsOverMaxTooltip: A skill would exceed the 12 point cap
levelUpDialog.rollHitDiceTooltip: Roll your Hit Die with advantage and increase your max HP by that much.

levelDownDialog.warningMessage: This action will permanently revert the last level up. This cannot be undone.
levelDownDialog.levelUpInProgress: Cannot revert level while a level up is in progress.

skillPointAssignment.onlyOneNewPointAndOneTransferAllowed: Only 1 new point and 1 transfer are allowed per level-up.
skillPointAssignment.reduceAnotherSkillFirstToAddSkillPoint: Reduce another skill first to add a skill point.
skillPointAssignment.limitReached: Limit reached: Only 1 new point and 1 transfer are allowed per level-up.

creatureFeatures.actionSequence: After each hero's turn, choose one.

ctSettings.allowPlayersViewExpandedMonsters: Allow Players to View Expanded Monsters

heroicActions.title: Heroic Actions

defend.label: Defend
defend.description: Reduce damage from any single attack by your Armor value. At the GM's discretion, some damage may not be avoidable (e.g., psychic damage, or some areas of effect).
defend.panelDescription: Reduce damage from any single attack by your Armor ({armor}). Some damage like psychic or certain area effects may not be avoidable.
defend.title: Defend
defend.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to Defend, reducing damage by their Armor value ({armor}).

interpose.label: Interpose
interpose.description: When a creature within 2 spaces would be struck with an attack, you can push them out of the way and become the new target. You enter their space and move them to an adjacent space of your choice.
interpose.panelDescription: When an ally within 2 spaces would be hit, push them aside and become the new target. You enter their space and move them adjacent.
interpose.title: Interpose
interpose.tip: Combine with Defend to also reduce the damage you take!
interpose.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to Interpose, stepping in front of {target} to become the target of an attack.

interposeAndDefend.chatMessage: {name} uses 2 reactions to Interpose for {target} and Defend, reducing damage by their Armor value ({armor}).

opportunity.label: Opportunity Attack
opportunity.description: Make a melee attack against an adjacent enemy as it willingly moves away. Only heroes can make opportunity attacks - monsters cannot.
opportunity.panelDescription: Strike an adjacent enemy as they willingly move away. Only heroes can make opportunity attacks.
opportunity.title: Opportunity Attack
opportunity.disadvantage: This attack is made with disadvantage
opportunity.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to make an Opportunity Attack with {weapon}.

help.label: Help
help.description: Grant an ally advantage on a roll if you can reasonably explain to the GM how you could help in the situation. Limited to one Help reaction per roll.
help.panelDescription: Grant an ally advantage on a roll by explaining how you help. The GM may require a skill check. Limited to one Help per roll.
help.title: Help
help.effect: Grants an ally advantage on their roll
help.tip: Think fast when an ally fails! A creative explanation might turn failure into success.
help.chatMessage: {name} uses their reaction to Help {target}, granting them advantage on their roll.

move.title: Move
move.panelDescription: Move up to your speed. You can split movement around other actions.

heroicActions.noPermissionEndTurn: You do not have permission to end turns.
heroicActions.noPermissionRollInitiative: You do not have permission to roll initiative.
heroicActions.initiativeAlreadyRolled: Initiative has already been rolled for this combatant.
heroicActions.noWeapons: No weapons or attack features found.

help.tooltip: What can I do in combat?

actions.intro: On your turn, you get 3 actions. All 3 recharge at the end of your turn, so spend them all! Generally, doing any single thing costs 1 action.
actions.footer: Rushed Attacks: Additional attacks after the first impose cumulative disadvantage.

attack.title: Attack
attack.description: Roll the die listed on your weapon or ability. Rolling a 1 is a miss. Rolling max on the Primary Die is a critical hit - roll again and add! Crits ignore armor.

spell.title: Cast a Spell
spell.description: Requires a free hand (or focus) and the ability to speak. Costs mana equal to the spell's tier (cantrips are free). You can upcast spells for greater effect.

move.title: Move
move.description: Move up to your speed (usually 6 spaces). You can split movement around other actions and Move multiple times per turn. Difficult terrain halves speed.

assess.title: Assess
assess.description: Make a DC 12 skill check to: Ask a Question (GM answers honestly), Create an Opening (+1 to Primary Die vs target), or Anticipate Danger (-1 to Primary Dice against you). Can't reuse the same skill in an encounter!

free.title: Free Actions
free.description: Simple tasks like opening an unlocked door, shouting a phrase, dropping an item, or ending concentration. Limited to once per turn.

reactions.intro: Reactions cost 1 action and are used when it's not your turn. Each reaction can only be used once per round, and you'll start your next turn with fewer actions.
reactions.footer: You can combine reactions (like Interpose + Defend) if you have enough actions to spend!

defend.title: Defend
defend.description: Reduce damage from any single attack by your Armor value. Some damage (like psychic or certain area effects) may not be avoidable at the GM's discretion.

interpose.title: Interpose
interpose.description: When a creature within 2 spaces would be hit, push them aside and become the new target. You enter their space and move them to an adjacent space of your choice.

opportunity.title: Opportunity Attack
opportunity.description: Make a melee attack with disadvantage against an adjacent enemy as it willingly moves away. Only heroes can make opportunity attacks - monsters cannot.

help.title: Help
help.description: Grant an ally advantage on a roll if you can explain how you'd help. The GM may call for a skill check or grant it automatically. Limited to one Help per roll.

assess.noTargetsHint: Target a token on the canvas to select it
assess.tooManyTargetsHint: You can only target one creature at a time for this action
assess.cannotTargetSelf: You cannot target yourself. Target another creature on the canvas.

askQuestion.title: Ask a Question
askQuestion.description: Ask the GM a question about the situation. They must answer truthfully based on what your character could reasonably perceive.
askQuestion.success: {name} used an action to assess and may ask the GM one question. The GM will answer honestly.
askQuestion.failure: {name} used an action to assess but failed to glean any useful information.

createOpening.title: Create an Opening
createOpening.description: Your next attack against the target gains +1 to the Primary Die this round.
createOpening.success: {name} used an action to assess {target} and create an opening. Their next attack against {target} gains +1 to the Primary Die.
createOpening.failure: {name} used an action to assess {target} but failed to create an opening.

anticipateDanger.title: Anticipate Danger
anticipateDanger.description: All Primary Dice rolled against you are reduced by 1 this round.
anticipateDanger.success: {name} used an action to assess and anticipate danger. All Primary Dice rolled against them are reduced by 1 this round.
anticipateDanger.failure: {name} used an action to assess but failed to anticipate danger.

move.title: Move
move.panelDescription: Move up to your speed. You can split movement around other actions and move multiple times per turn.
move.confirmDescription: Confirm that you've repositioned your character on the battlefield.
move.chatMessage: {name} used an action to Move, with a speed of {speed} spaces.

hitDice.bonusHitDiceHint: Hit dice bonuses received from boons, ancestries, or features
hitDice.hitDiceSizeIncreased: All hit dice sizes are increased by {steps} step(s)
hitDice.heading: Hit Dice

hitPoints.bonusHpHint: Static bonus from feats, items, or other sources

manaConfig.classContributionsHint: Formula-based mana gained from your classes
manaConfig.baseManaHint: Static mana before class formula contributions
manaConfig.initiativeInfo: Initiative recovery is currently informational only.

safeRest.allResourcesFull: All resources are already at full capacity.

fieldRest.catchBreathDescription: 10 min rest. Roll Hit Dice + STR to heal.
fieldRest.makeCampDescription: 8 hour rest. Take max Hit Die value + STR.
fieldRest.noHitDiceAvailable: No hit dice available to spend

npcSheet.dropError: Failed to process dropped item. Please report this issue.

movementConfig.gridSpacesNote: All measurements are in grid spaces.

characterSettings.executeItemMacros: Execute Item Macros on Item Activation

classFeatureSelection.hint: The following features are available at level 1 for your class. Some features are automatically granted, while others require you to make a choice.

classSelection.noClassesAvailable: There are no classes available in this world's compendium packs.

scaling.heading: Spell Scaling
scaling.targetEffectHint: Add effects in the Activation tab to select targets here.

autoExpandRolls.name: Auto-Expand Rolls
autoExpandRolls.hint: When enabled, dice roll details are shown inline below each roll in chat messages, without needing to hover.

autoAddCharacterToCombatOnInitiativeRoll.name: Auto-Add Character To Combat On Initiative Roll
autoAddCharacterToCombatOnInitiativeRoll.hint: When enabled, rolling initiative from a character sheet adds that character to the current scene combat before rolling, if they are not already in combat.

autoTrackTokenAdjacency.name: Auto-Track Token Adjacency
autoTrackTokenAdjacency.hint: When enabled, the system automatically tracks which combatants have the most adjacent enemies and makes that information available to rules.

adjacencyIncludesDiagonals.name: Adjacency Includes Diagonals
adjacencyIncludesDiagonals.hint: When enabled, tokens that share only a corner are considered adjacent (diagonal adjacency). When disabled, only tokens sharing a full edge are adjacent (orthogonal only).

ncswEnabled.name: Enable Combat System
ncswEnabled.hint: Show the Combat System panel during combat. Helps GMs quickly target heroes and roll attacks for minions, monsters, and legendary monsters.

combatTrackerSettings.title: Combat Tracker Settings
combatTrackerSettings.introText: Current Turn Animation controls are live. All other sections remain preview-only.
combatTrackerSettings.layoutHint: Choose where the tracker docks on screen.
combatTrackerSettings.allowPlayersToMoveCards: Allow players to move other players' cards
combatTrackerSettings.warnOnEndTurn: Warn players when clicking "End Turn" with actions remaining
combatTrackerSettings.roleBasedControlsHint: The GM-facing permission matrix below is UI-only and not yet wired to behavior.
combatTrackerSettings.extensibilityHint: Additional combat tracker settings can be added to this window over time.
combatTrackerSettings.playersCanMoveCards: Players can move other players cards
combatTrackerSettings.warnOnEndTurnLabel: Warn on End Turn with actions left

warnings.endTurnNotApplied: End turn was not applied because this group is not currently active.

notifications.noActiveCombatForGroupAttack: No active combat found for group attack.
notifications.selectTargetBeforeGroupAttack: Select token target before rolling a group attack.
notifications.groupAttackFailed: Group attack failed. See console for details.
notifications.noActiveCombatForMonsterAttack: No active combat found for monster attack.

notifications.monsterAttackFailed: Monster attack failed. See console for details.
